trans-unit.source: Authentication with T3Planet Credits failed: no access token was sent.
Your T3Planet Credits session is invalid or expired. Click Activate to sign in again.
The selected license key is not valid for T3Planet Credits.
Your T3Planet license has expired. Renew the license to use Credits mode.
Your T3Planet license is suspended. Contact T3Planet support.
This TYPO3 installation domain is not authorized for the selected license.
Your T3Planet credit balance is too low for this request.
Purchase more credits: %s
Your T3Planet Credits plan has expired. Renew or upgrade your plan.
Too many requests to T3Planet Credits. Please wait %s seconds and try again.
This request was already processed with different data. Start a new AI request.
The requested AI feature is not available on your T3Planet Credits plan.
The referenced T3Planet Credits request could not be found.
Admin access to T3Planet Credits was denied.
The upstream AI provider returned an error. Try again or switch feature/model.
The upstream AI provider timed out. Try again with a shorter prompt.
A required field was missing in the T3Planet Credits request.
This T3Planet Credits endpoint does not accept the request method used.
T3Planet Credits encountered an internal error. Please try again later.
Could not reach the T3Planet Credits API. Check the API base URL in extension settings and your network connection.
T3Planet Credits returned an invalid response. Check the API base URL and server logs.
No T3Planet license keys are configured. Install ns_license or add license keys.
No T3Planet license keys were found. Activate a T3Planet extension license first.
An AI feature key is required when T3Planet Credits mode is active.
The T3Planet Credits service returned an error. Please try again.
An unexpected error occurred while contacting T3Planet Credits.
